form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.36) when sixth over 520m at Wentworth Park in a Grade 4/5. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and five places from 11 starts. Has ability and looks a key chance.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (42.28) at Wentworth Park in a NG, finishing eighth and beaten 11 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed four times. Among the chances on best.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (30.18) at big odds over 515m at The Gardens. Drawn awkwardly. Will need plenty of luck.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last on April 18 over 520m at Wentworth Park behind Elsa Above beaten 8 lengths (30.83) in a Grade 5. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.
